case_title: MARIA ELENA TAVARES VS. FERNANDO DE VALLE

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF TAVARES, MARIA ELENA AS TO DEFENDANT DE VALLE, FERNANDO AN INDIVIDUAL DBA FERNANDO'S AUTO BODY & PAINTING JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TAVARES, MARIA ELENA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DE VALLE, FERNANDO AN INDIVIDUAL DBA FERNANDO'S AUTO BODY & PAINTING $12,478.13 PRINCIPAL, $202.74 INTEREST, $300.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $12,980.87, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

NOTICE OF ASSIGNMENT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY ASSIGNEE CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INC. DBA GREAT WESTERN COLLECTION BUREAU AS TO DEFENDANT DE VALLE, FERNANDO AN INDIVIDUAL DBA FERNANDO'S AUTO BODY & PAINTING

NOTICE OF MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWER TO POST-JUDGMENT DISCOVERY; AND FOR AWARD OF MONETARY SANCTIONS, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY ASSIGNEE CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INC. DBA GREAT WESTERN COLLECTION BUREAU HEARING SET FOR DEC-02-2008 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 612
MINI-MINUTES FOR DEC-02-2008 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 612

DISCOVERY 612, PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO POST-JUDGMENT DISCOVERY IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. DEFENDANT IS ORDERED TO RESPOND WITHIN 15 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. DEFENDANT'S FAILURE TO RESPOND WAS A MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED AGAINST DEFENDANT IN THE AMOUNT OF $340, TO BE PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion To Compel Answer To Post-Judgment Discovery; And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Dec-02-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
RULING: Plaintiff's Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Defendant's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Sanctions are awarded against Defendant in the amount of $340, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED
